event_text: r_c dares m_c to leap across the Silverpath in front of a Thundersnake near camp and is horrified when {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} {VERB/m_c/stumble/stumbles} and {VERB/m_c/are/is} struck.

history.death: m_c was struck and killed by a Thundersnake.

event_text: Driven to desperation by the greenleaf heat, m_c drinks from a foul-tasting puddle of water. The Clan finds {PRONOUN/m_c/object} dead in {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} nest hours later.

history.death: m_c died after drinking poisoned water.

event_text: m_c wanders to the nearby Silverpath. Before anyone can guide {PRONOUN/m_c/object} home, {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} {VERB/m_c/are/is} struck and killed by a Thundersnake.

history.death: m_c was struck and killed by a Thundersnake.
